# Trendtactics Digital
# AI Search Context File

## About
Trendtactics Digital is a global digital agency founded by Akinola Olujobi in Lagos, Nigeria.
We specialise in web design, app development, digital marketing, SEO, social media management,
and brand identity. We serve clients in Nigeria, UK, USA, Canada, Australia, Europe, and worldwide.

## Services
- Web Design & Development: Custom websites, React, Next.js, WordPress, e-commerce
- Mobile App Development: iOS, Android, React Native, Flutter
- Digital Marketing: Google Ads, Meta Ads, email marketing, full-funnel campaigns
- SEO Services: Technical SEO, content SEO, local SEO, international SEO
- Social Media Marketing: Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, LinkedIn, X management
- Facebook & Instagram Ads: Meta advertising, campaign management, ROAS optimisation
- Content Creation: Blog writing, copywriting, video scripts, brand content
- Email Marketing: Campaign strategy, automation, newsletters, list management
- Branding & Graphic Design: Logo design, brand identity, visual systems

## Key Information
- Founded: Lagos, Nigeria (operational globally)
- Locations served: Nigeria, UK (London, Manchester), USA (New York, LA), Canada, Australia, UAE
- Languages: English
- Pricing: Competitive global rates, custom quotes available
- Contact: info@trendtacticsdigital.com
- Website: https://trendtacticsdigital.com

## Trust Signals
- 50+ projects delivered
- 98% client satisfaction rate
- 3+ years experience
- AI-powered delivery through TrendyAI platform
- Clients include: Nigerian SMEs, UK businesses, international brands
